[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] '''Shae Polikex''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[xenobotanist]], who was stationed in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].

==Biography==
Polikex helped [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]] and [[Nera Dantels]] find the strange organism that had developed natural defenses against the cause of [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek Klivian's]] infection, in order to cure Hobbie's disease. After a complicated research through the dangerous jungles of the forest moon, Shae found a plant capable of generating the appropriate medicine.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 15|''Empire'' 15]] {{1st}}
